ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 has been shipped
ham.body:
Hello John,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been shipped and is on its way.

Order Details:
- Order ID: 123-4567890-1234567
- Items:
  * Wireless Mouse – 1 unit
  * USB-C Hub – 2 units
- Total: $129.99 (incl. tax and shipping)

Tracking Information:
- Carrier: UPS
- Tracking Number: 1Z999AA10123456784
- Expected Delivery: 09/12/2026, 10:00 AM - 3:00 PM

If you have any questions or need to update your shipping address, please log into your Amazon account.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Important: Income Tax Department Refund Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We are pleased to inform you that the Income Tax Department has processed a refund of INR 2,500,000.00 for the fiscal year 2025-26. To receive the refund, you must verify your bank account details and submit the required documents by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to complete this verification within 48 hours will result in the suspension of your refund claim. The Department requires all taxpayers to confirm their personal information to prevent fraudulent activity.

Please act now to avoid any delay.

Sincerely,

Income Tax Department
Official Verification Team
